scripts.design:sync: sass src/styles/tokens/index.scss styles/tokens.css --no-source-map --style=expanded && sass src/styles/SystemCompat.scss styles/system.css --no-source-map --style=expanded && sass src/components/UI/SectionHeading/SectionHeading.scss styles/section-heading.css --no-source-map --style=expanded && sass src/pages/ProfilePage/ProfileLegacy.scss styles/design-3-profile.css --no-source-map --style=expanded && node scripts/sync-legacy-assets.mjs
scripts.dev:cloudflare: npm run build && wrangler pages dev
scripts.build: npm run design:sync && vite build && npm run copy:assets
